Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Emala]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Emala was the Rune Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Emala died in the Dread War.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Emala left pieces of her Grand Oath Array behind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Emala is a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Emala's Grand Oath Array was based on runes derived from the ancient runes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Emala died in the Dread War and broke apart one of her Arrays to maintain a seal around Shatterspine Castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Emala sealed the castle with the Grand Oath Array.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Emala was once a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Emala was a Monarch who left behind script-circles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Emala has madra.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
